cluster_ids.name: Account Login
cluster_ids.summary: Provides commands (GetSetupPIN, Login, Logout) to manage account-based login and setup PIN for PASE with a Commissionee.

classifications.summary: Base application cluster on an endpoint; PICS ALOGIN used to declare support: if PICS(ALOGIN) then implement Account Login behavior.

revisions.description: Initial revision of Account Login cluster specification.
Add support for 8-character PIN code; add Node to Login/Logout commands; add LoggedOut event.

commands.name: GetSetupPIN
commands.summary: Check if TempAccountIdentifier account matches active account; if match and within rate limits, return Setup PIN for PASE, else return empty/NULL or FAILURE. Enforce max 10 unique req/10min and 10min identifier lifetime.
commands.timing: Server: ≤10 unique GetSetupPIN requests per 10 minutes per applicable scope; Temporary Account Identifier valid ≤10 minutes.

fields.name: TempAccountIdentifier
fields.summary: Specifies client’s Temporary Account Identifier; length ≥16 chars to mitigate guessing. Often derived from Rotating Device Identifier hex string.

commands.name: GetSetupPINResponse
commands.summary: Carries Setup PIN string or empty string if accounts do not match. Client uses presence/non-empty to decide whether PASE can proceed.

fields.name: SetupPIN
fields.constraint: text string; length ≥8 if non-empty; empty string indicates no match
fields.summary: Contains setup PIN for PASE when accounts match; empty string signals account mismatch. New clients note older rev required min 11 digits.

commands.name: Login
commands.summary: Given TempAccountIdentifier and SetupPIN (and optional Node), server checks if PIN is current/valid for that account; if valid, MAY make that user account active. Enforce rate limits and temp ID lifetime.
commands.timing: Server: ≤10 unique Login requests per 10 minutes per applicable scope; Temporary Account Identifier valid ≤10 minutes.

fields.name: TempAccountIdentifier
fields.summary: Client’s temporary account identifier used to look up user and associated Setup PIN mapping.

fields.name: SetupPIN
fields.summary: Setup PIN code as text string (typically 8 or 11 decimal digits) used to validate and map TempAccountIdentifier to an account.

fields.name: Node
fields.summary: Optional client Node ID; Content App MAY use to track which Nodes currently have access.

commands.name: Logout
commands.summary: Instructs Content App to clear current user account; optionally scoped to a Node. SHOULD be used to mark end of user session and may trigger LoggedOut event and ACL revocation.

fields.name: Node
fields.summary: Optional client Node ID used by the Content App to track and potentially revoke this Node’s access.

events.name: LoggedOut
events.summary: Emitted by the Content App when the current user logs out; Fabric Admin SHALL remove access to this Content App for the specified Node, or for all non-Admin Nodes if Node is absent.

fields.name: Node
fields.summary: Node ID of the user account that logged out; if available include this field, else omit it. Pseudocode: if (NodeIdAvailable) include Node; else omit.

references.name: ClusterRevision
references.description: Global attribute storing highest supported revision; used to track cluster version but not defined in this section.

references.name: PASE (password-authenticated session establishment)
references.description: Secure session setup using a PIN: if accountsMatch then use SetupPIN for PASE; cryptographic details in core spec, not here.

references.name: Commissionee
references.description: Node being commissioned; used in GetSetupPIN logic: if activeAccount(ContentApp)==activeAccount(Commissionee) then return Setup PIN.

references.name: Content App Platform
references.description: Platform hosting multiple content app endpoints; mentioned as caller of GetSetupPIN but behavior defined elsewhere.

references.name: Phone App
references.description: Client application used during commissioning; referenced as a use case but not specified here.

references.name: Video Player device
references.description: Device type that may host this cluster server to simplify login; full device behavior specified outside this section.

references.name: Content App endpoint
references.description: Endpoint running a Content App cluster set; used as target for GetSetupPIN, but its clusters/attributes are defined elsewhere.

references.name: MatterCore - Rotating Device Identifier
references.description: Defines Rotating Device Identifier and commissionable node advertisement; used to derive Temporary Account Identifier as uppercase hex octet string.

references.name: MatterCore - Manual Pairing Code
references.description: Defines Manual Pairing Code and Passcode; used as source of Setup PIN for Commissionee, encoded as 8–11 character decimal string.

references.name: Commissioner / Admin Node Behavior
references.description: Commissioner/Admin prompts user for consent before invoking GetSetupPIN and uses returned Setup PIN for PASE commissioning flows.

references.name: Central Account Mapping Service
references.description: External service used by Content App to map Temporary Account Identifier to account and Setup PIN; must enforce aggressive timeouts to avoid delayed or accidental logins.

references.name: Fabric Admin
references.description: On LoggedOut event, Fabric Admin SHALL remove access: if Node present, revoke that Node’s access; else revoke all non-Admin Node access for the Content App.

references.name: Content App
references.description: Application represented by this cluster; emits LoggedOut when the current user logs out to drive access revocation by the Fabric Admin.

references.name: Device Type Library
references.description: External document defining device types and endpoints; referenced for how a Content App is represented as an endpoint.
